# Webflow's auto-generated default.

# Canonical AI agent help: https://www.redactor.com/llms.txt
# ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# ── AI agent help (Deft dashdash llms.txt discoverability) ──────────
User-agent: *
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /llms-full.txt

# ── Default policy: allow everything except admin/test paths ────────
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /test/
Disallow: /tmp/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /secure/
Disallow: /wp-admin/
